settings.heroCopy: Premium construction, bespoke interior architecture, and disciplined project delivery for high-value residential and commercial spaces.
settings.visionTitle: Craft, capital, and construction discipline in one studio.
settings.visionCopy: Veloura Spaces aligns concept, procurement, construction, and styling so each decision serves the architecture, the budget, and the way the space will actually be used.
settings.servicesCopy: Choose a single service or appoint us to lead the full journey from first concept through construction completion.
settings.projectsTitle: A visual directory of completed environments.
settings.projectsCopy: Explore selected residential, commercial, and hospitality work shaped with restraint, precision, and material depth.
settings.testimonialsTitle: Trusted by clients who need taste and execution.
settings.contactTitle: Tell us what you are building.
settings.contactCopy: Share the basics and we will respond with the right next step: feasibility review, design consultation, site visit, or project scoping.

services.title: Luxury Residential Construction
services.description: Ground-up homes, villa renovations, structural upgrades, extensions, and premium finishing programs.

services.title: Bespoke Interior Architecture
services.description: Space planning, joinery, lighting, material palettes, furniture specification, procurement, and final styling.

services.title: Commercial Fit-Outs
services.description: Hospitality, retail, office, and showroom environments planned for brand presence and daily operation.

projects.title: Harbor House
projects.description: Stone, linen, and walnut composed around a slow evening routine.
projects.scope: Full interior architecture, procurement, and styling

projects.title: The Ori Salon
projects.description: A compact members lounge with layered seating and theatrical lighting.
projects.scope: Commercial fit-out and custom furniture direction

projects.title: Atelier 42
projects.description: A quieter office language for focused work, hosting, and material review.
projects.scope: Workspace planning, materials, lighting, and installation

projects.title: Crescent Villa
projects.description: A limestone and timber residence arranged around water, gardens, and evening light.
projects.scope: Ground-up construction, facade detailing, and landscape interface

projects.title: Aurelia Court
projects.description: A boutique arrival experience defined by travertine, bronze, and warm ceremonial light.
projects.scope: Lobby interiors, custom reception desk, and material procurement

projects.title: Meridian House Office
projects.description: An executive studio and boardroom balancing private focus with confident hosting.
projects.scope: Executive workspace, millwork, lighting control, and furniture specification

testimonials.quote: Veloura managed the build with the seriousness of a capital project and the sensitivity of a design studio. The result feels exact, not overworked.
testimonials.name: Amara C.

testimonials.quote: They translated our hospitality brand into a physical environment without losing operational practicality. The fit-out opened on schedule.
testimonials.name: Tunde A.
